items.name: Attention-Span-Degradation-Detection-System
items.description: An intelligent, data-driven framework designed to monitor user interaction metrics in digital environments, classify attention states, and forecast focus trends over time using machine learning and time-series analysis.

items.name: pai-oncology-trial-fl
items.description: Federated machine learning framework for physical ai oncology trials.

items.name: pixelArtist
items.description: Simple Framework to create game for my machine learning research testing AI

items.name: security-vulnerabilities-detection-framework
items.description: Security Vulnerability Detection Framework designed to identify and mitigate key operating system vulnerabilities such as buffer overflows, cache poisoning, and abnormal system behavior. The framework combines rule-based monitoring with machine learning–based anomaly detection to provide real-time alerts and improved system security

items.name: Air-Quality-Prediction
items.description: An AI-powered framework for real-time air quality forecasting and localized AQI prediction using machine learning.

items.name: guidance-for-accelerator-optimized-agentic-bidding-on-aws
items.description: This Guidance demonstrates how to optimize real-time bidding decisions across multiple machine learning models by deploying GPU-accelerated NVIDIA model architectures that run in parallel within an ARTF-compliant framework.

items.name: HTL_BioOil_Prediction
items.description: Machine learning framework for predicting Hydrothermal Liquefaction (HTL) bio-oil yield using ensemble regression models and explainable AI.

items.name: SmartHealth-IoT
items.description: SmartHealth-IoT is a simulation-based remote patient monitoring framework that generates virtual smartwatch physiological streams, processes them through IoT-style ingestion, extracts sliding-window features, and predicts patient risk using VitalBoostNet. It combines machine-learning predictions .

items.name: DeepGNN
items.description: DeepGNN is a framework for training machine learning models on large scale graph data.

items.name: ethiopian-scales
items.description: Machine Learning framework for EMIR audio classification using MFCC, Chroma, Spectral Features, SVM, Random Forest, XGBoost, and SHAP-based explainability.

items.name: Phishing-Website-Detection-Using-Optimised-Machine-Learning-And-Deep-Learning
items.description: This project develops an enhanced phishing detection framework using a novel hybrid CNN + XGBoost architecture. It employs a Hybrid Ensemble Feature Selection (HEFS) methodology and compares tuned models such as Random Forest, XGBoost, CNN, and TCN via meta-learning layers to provide a robust solution for identifying malicious URLs.

items.name: Forecasting-Stock-Volatility-using-ML
items.description: To design and implement a robust machine learning framework to forecast one-month-ahead stock volatility using historical price data, enhancing risk assessment capabilities and enabling data-driven portfolio diversification.

items.name: Interpretable-ML-Prediction-of-Metal-Ligand-Stability-Constants
items.description: Machine learning framework for predicting stability constants of metal–ligand complexes using metal-containing SMILES, RDKit and metal-specific descriptors. Integrates MLP, CNN and ensemble with Bayesian optimization. Trained on NIST and IUPAC datasets. SHAP analysis enables interpretable prediction for ligand screening and metal-ion selectivity.

items.name: 5G-Telecom-Interference-Analytics-using-Big-Data-and-Machine-Learning
items.description: Adaptive telecom interference detection framework using PySpark, Kafka, Docker, LightGBM, Isolation Forest, SHAP, and Streamlit. Predicts network interference (R² = 0.6534), detects anomalies in real time, explains predictions with SHAP, and visualizes 5G network performance through an interactive dashboard.

items.name: MLOPS-Databricks
items.description: The MLOPS-Databricks repository is a comprehensive framework designed to streamline the machine learning lifecycle—from data ingestion and model training to deployment and monitoring—leveraging the power of the Databricks Lakehouse platform.

items.name: PREDICTIVE--RISK-INTELLIGENCE
items.description: A multi-modal predictive machine learning framework for binary and multi-class risk intelligence, anomaly detection, and classification workflows.

items.name: HepaStage-ANOVA-ML
items.description: A multi-class machine learning framework for Hepatitis C stage classification using ANOVA-based feature selection.

items.name: urban-climate-ai-mitigation
items.description: A Physics-Informed Machine Learning framework and interactive simulation engine designed to quantify urban heat drivers and optimize spatial cooling interventions for climate resilience.

items.name: FishAMR-Link
items.description: A fault-tolerant, single-module computational framework for automated epizootic plasmid risk assessment and biothreat stratification featuring topological gene proximity networking, machine learning classification, and relational SQLite warehousing.

items.name: Multi-Modal-Machine-Learning-Framework-for-Social-Media-Addiction-Risk-Prediction
items.description: Multi-Modal Machine Learning Framework for Social Media Addiction Risk Prediction Using Behavioural, Textual, and Demographic Data

items.description: A machine learning and deep learning framework for forecasting gold prices using macroeconomic indicators.

items.name: CQM_NA-ST
items.description: A Hybrid Classical-Quantum Machine Learning Framework for Scalable Noise Analysis and State Tomography

items.name: covert_channel_analysis
items.description: Machine learning framework for detecting storage-based covert channels in encrypted network traffic without payload inspection. Generates synthetic packet data using Scapy, extracts sliding-window entropy features from TCP/IP headers, and benchmarks multiple classifiers for accurate covert channel detection.

items.name: Dynamic-Polarization-Compensation-in-Fiber-Optics
items.description: Real-time Active Disturbance Rejection and State of Polarization (SOP) Tracking System utilizing an advanced Hybrid Machine Learning & Hill Climbing control framework for fiber optic networks.

items.name: starch-digestion-digital-twin-bayesian
items.description: A Bayesian digital twin framework for modeling starch digestion behavior from processing conditions and microstructural properties, enabling uncertainty-aware prediction of food structure–function relationships using lightweight machine learning models.

items.name: bank-risk-ml-panel-analysis
items.description: Financial risk prediction framework for Indian banks using Panel Data Econometrics and Machine Learning. Built with Python, featuring Panel Logistic Regression, Logistic Regression, Decision Tree, Random Forest, SVM, KNN, Naïve Bayes, PCA, and comprehensive EDA on a dataset of 41 Indian banking institutions (2021–2026).

items.name: Explainable-AI-Framework-for-Early-Prediction-of-Women-s-Health-and-Nutritional-Deficiencies
items.description: AI-powered healthcare application for early prediction of PCOS and anemia using explainable machine learning. Integrates SHAP, LIME, RAG, and FLAN-T5 to generate transparent predictions and personalized health recommendations.

items.name: Car-evaluation-system-
items.description: A car evaluation system refers to a framework, algorithm, or software program used to assess a vehicle based on specific parameters. Depending on the context, this system can serve distinct purposes: calculating financial resale values, conducting deep mechanical diagnostics, analyzing consumer acceptability datasets for machine learning.

items.name: hotel-revenue-optimization-engine
items.description: An enterprise machine learning pipeline and predictive engine designed to mitigate hotel booking cancellations, eliminate revenue leaks, and optimize inventory allocation using advanced ensemble modeling and operational risk-weighted frameworks.

items.name: Dynamic-Credit-Limit-Optimization
items.description: Machine Learning framework for dynamic mortgage credit limit optimization.

items.description: Official implementation of IFOSS (Isolation Forest + One-Sided Selection), a systematic preprocessing framework for robust machine learning on noisy clinical COVID-19 data. The repository includes preprocessing, benchmarking, visualization, ablation, and simulation studies for reproducible clinical machine learning research.

items.name: supply-chain-late-delivery-prediction
items.description: An end-to-end industrial machine learning framework that predicts shipment delays using the DataCo Smart Supply Chain Dataset. It processes 180k records, implements rigorous leakage auditing, and features a nine-model tournament where a baseline Decision Tree achieved a 91.5% F1-score. Includes a Streamlit batch prediction app.

items.name: Diplomado_Modulo4_ML
items.description: Se profundiza en los fundamentos del aprendizaje automático (Machine Learning), aprendizaje profundo (Deep Learning) y análisis predictivo, capacitando a los estudiantes en el uso de bibliotecas y frameworks como TensorFlow, Scikit-Learn y Keras.

items.name: multiagent-rl-rm

The framework supports the integration of Reward Machines (RMs), providing a modular and flexible structure for defining complex tasks.

items.description: Machine learning framework for vaccine target discovery in ESKAPE pathogens — extracts sequence-based features and classifies candidate proteins with confidence scoring. Installable via pip, includes a local web interface for running analyses.
